landing.title: Nikhil Swami
landing.projectDescription: MS CS @ ASU · Building things that just work — from mobile apps to intelligent systems.

about.tagline: I turn caffeine into beautiful, bug-free apps.
about.description: MS CS student at ASU (May 2026), shipping things that actually work. I've built mobile apps with millions of downloads, backend systems that stay up, and I'm now diving deep into generative AI - LLMs, RAG, and agentic systems.
about.experienceSummary: 3 companies, 2+ years, millions of users and still just getting started.

experiences.summary: Contributed to a high-growth SaaS collaboration platform, architecting the transition from legacy systems to a high-performance Flutter & Go microservices stack for 500K+ users.

detailBannerData.title: Go
detailBannerData.subtitle: Built and maintained Go microservices with gRPC and REST APIs.

detailBannerData.title: Flutter
detailBannerData.subtitle: Led end-to-end migration from legacy native app to Flutter + Go stack.

detailBannerData.title: gRPC
detailBannerData.subtitle: Enabled real-time communication across distributed system layers.

detailBannerData.title: Clean Architecture
detailBannerData.subtitle: Applied MVVM + TDD — reduced production defects by 32%.

experiences.summary: Engineered scalable backend and mobile solutions for Zadinga (a Reliance-backed SaaS), enabling digital transformation for thousands of retail businesses via Azure-hosted .NET microservices.

detailBannerData.title: Flutter
detailBannerData.subtitle: Cross-platform mobile app development for Android, iOS and web.

detailBannerData.title: Azure
detailBannerData.subtitle: Cloud infrastructure and deployments on Microsoft Azure.

detailBannerData.title: .NET Core
detailBannerData.subtitle: Engineered scalable SaaS back-end services with 99.9% uptime.

detailBannerData.title: CI/CD
detailBannerData.subtitle: Automated pipelines with GitHub Actions — cut deployment cycles by 14%.

experiences.summary: Developed core features for a top-tier E-commerce/Quick-Commerce platform, implementing Server-Driven UI to manage real-time updates for over 1 million active users with 99.9% crash-free sessions.

detailBannerData.title: Flutter
detailBannerData.subtitle: Built Server-Driven UI enabling real-time, release-free UI updates.

detailBannerData.title: Firebase
detailBannerData.subtitle: Push notifications, Crashlytics, dynamic links, and A/B testing.

detailBannerData.title: REST APIs
detailBannerData.subtitle: Integrated APIs and WebSockets throughout the app.

detailBannerData.title: Performance
detailBannerData.subtitle: Eliminated memory leaks — crash-free sessions jumped from 96% to 99%.
